name: Entra Stale Active Accounts (90 days)
description: Detects active entra accounts with no recent login activity for 90 days.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.display_name AS account_name, u.last_sign_in_datetime AS last_login FROM entra_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.account_enabled, true) = true AND (u.last_sign_in_datetime IS NULL OR u.last_sign_in_datetime < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days')
remediation: Review stale accounts and disable or deprovision access if no valid business need exists.
